title: botrychium ascendens
intro: Botrychium ascendens, also known as the ascending rattlesnake fern, is a type of rare and unique perennial fern native to the mountainous regions of the western United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Botrychium ascendens include its ability to reduce swelling and promote tissue repair, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing the fronds, which can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
